name: civil_infrastructure_cold_chain_redwood_ind_col
premise: A contractual SLA is about to breach; the least-bad mitigation option touches privacy, safety, or fairness in uncomfortable ways. In Civil Infrastructure, the situation tagged internally around civil infrastructure cold chain redwood ind col has converged with local pressure in the Redwood corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. Framing has already hardened externally as individual against collective; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Talia Nowak
agents.identity: I am Talia Nowak, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Civil Infrastructure. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Arjun Navarro
agents.identity: I am Arjun Navarro, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Civil Infrastructure. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on collective.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on collective for immediate traction on individual.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Talia Nowak must choose under individual versus collective. What does Talia Nowak do?
